meta.key_finding: Shellac E904 exhibits SIGNIFICANT institutional disagreement (khilaf) — split between permissive institutions (MUI, JAKIM, SANHA, Dar al-Iftaa Egypt) and restrictive ones (Darul Ifta Birmingham, DUA). No institutional ijma.

substance.primary_name_ar: صمغ اللك / الشيلاك / إفرازات حشرة اللك
substance.description_fr: Résine naturelle sécrétée par l'insecte femelle Kerria lacca. Transformée industriellement en poudre/pellets via filtration, blanchiment, dilution éthanol. Utilisée en enrobage pharmaceutique entérique, confiserie, conservation fruits frais (pommes, agrumes, poires).

core_fiqhi_concepts.principle: La permissibilité varie par madhab: Hanafi (haram sauf sauterelle), Shafi'i (haram sauf sauterelle), Hanbali (haram majorité), Maliki (halal if slaughtered)
Substance impure → transformation complète → devient pure. Reconnu par les 4 madhāhib. Débat: le shellac industriel constitue-t-il une vraie istihalah?

hanafi.contemporary_split: DIVIDED — majority classical restriction vs. minority (Mufti Taqi Usmani) tahir secretion
hanafi.contemporary_position: Mufti Taqi Usmani (Karachi) HALAL; Darul Ifta Birmingham HARAM

maliki.classical: HALAL if slaughtered with niyyah + tasmiyah
maliki.industrial_problem: Mass production violates both conditions entirely
maliki.practical_verdict_industrial: Even Maliki cannot justify industrial shellac

shafi'i.position: HARAM — insects are khabaith per Quran 7:157

hanbali.contemporary: Lajnah Daimah, Ibn Baz, Ibn Uthaymin — restrictive [STATUS: UNRESOLVED — see saudi_sources_audit]

saudi_sources_audit.claim_in_original_draft: Lajnah Dāʾimah, Ibn Bāz, Ibn ʿUthaymīn cited as restrictive on shellac/insect secretions
saudi_sources_audit.actual_verification_level: ATTESTED_PRINCIPLE only — derived by analogy from their general positions on insects and najāsa, NOT a direct fatwa naming صمغ اللك / shellac

live_fetch_attempts.query: صمغ اللك فتوى ابن باز ابن عثيمين اللجنة الدائمة (Google)
shellac E904 ruling Ibn Baz Uthaymeen Permanent Committee

saudi_sources_audit.impact_on_score: None — the 45/100 MASHBOOH verdict rests on the verified IslamQA + Dar al-Iftaa Egypt + JAKIM + AMJA + MUI cluster, not on Saudi sources. Saudi positions are now downgraded to ATTESTED_PRINCIPLE.

ijma_and_khilaf.ijma_zone_1: All 4 madhabs recognize istihalah principle (transformation changes substance nature)
ijma_and_khilaf.ijma_zone_2: All 4 madhabs recognize Qur'an 7:157 prohibition of khabaith
ijma_and_khilaf.khilaf_zone_1: Do insects inherit impurity to their secretions? OR are secretions independent tahir substances?
ijma_and_khilaf.khilaf_zone_2: What processes constitute true istihalah? Industrial filtering + ethanol dilution = real transformation?
ijma_and_khilaf.khilaf_zone_3: Permissibility of insect consumption — ranges from complete prohibition (Hanafi, Shafi'i) to conditional permission (Maliki)

naqiy_position.rationale: Majority classical madhabs prohibit insects. Contemporary split within same madhabs. Precaution principle (dع ما يريبك). Geographic guidance: follow MUI (Indonesia/Malaysia), Dar al-Iftaa Egypt, or local certified halal body. Avoid if HMC/IFANCA/UK standards apply.
naqiy_position.byproduct_position_external_use: All positions permit external cosmetic use (nail polish, wood varnish, cosmetics)

scenario_1_mui_certified_tablet.context: Shellac-coated tablet certified by MUI with halal certificate
scenario_1_mui_certified_tablet.rationale: MUI explicit certification. Pharmaceutical (necessity). Tahqiq al-manat applied.

scenario_2_uncertified_bonbon.context: Shellac-coated candy (Jelly Belly, gummy) with no halal label
scenario_2_uncertified_bonbon.rationale: No certification. Pleasure use (not necessity). Controversy unresolved. Precaution applies.

scenario_3_fresh_fruit_apple.context: Fresh apple with shellac wax coating, supermarket
scenario_3_fresh_fruit_apple.rationale: IslamQA #382570 explicitly permits. Widespread Muslim consumption. Can wash if concerned.

scenario_4_cosmetic_nail_polish.rationale: External use. No ingestion. All scholars permit.

scenario_6_ethanol_residue_above_05.rationale: Alcohol residue becomes separate issue. Conflicts with alcohol prohibition.
